notes: RP-000–RP-027 are excluded bootstrap diagnostics. Run-001 is the first real research and prose baseline. Research is accepted for framing: 23 rights-audited packets, complete R4 lived/science syntheses, 24/24 displayed quotations verified by the independent bird audit, and final Luna acceptance. The observed loop corrected evidence depth, packet support, synthesis method, persona/outcome structure, analogy safety, and exact traceability without adding a framework or deterministic research architecture. Framing is next. Muse Spark 1.1 is deferred until after this Opus baseline and does not block it.
